Amber Rutherford

Senior Editor

02 April 2026

# Easy Full-Body Tracking For VRChat With Moverse

#News#VR

Studio-grade, minimal equipment, and made for your room.

Moverse launched its Kickstarter today for Moverse Capture for VRChat, a new full-body tracking system aiming to bring markerless motion capture into people's homes. It's made with the VRChat community in mind, but thanks to SteamVR support, it can also be used with other full-body tracking apps. [...] It's being pitched as an easy, hassle-free option, no straps, batteries, or base stations needed. Instead, it uses a compact camera setup and Moverse's markerless tracking system, so you can go from setting it up to actually moving in VR pretty quickly. 

Moverse Capture for VRChat is a one-time purchase with no subscriptions, and the developer emphasizes that everything runs locally on your PC, none of your video is stored, recorded, or sent to the cloud. It's aimed at machines with an NVIDIA 3000-series GPU (or equivalent) and an i5 CPU. With your purchase, you get Luxonis OAK-1 W cameras, desk tripods, USB cables, a calibration board, and the software license included.

### Moverse [...] ### Moverse

The Kickstarter offers three options. The Individual License, priced at €299, is just the software, perfect for those who already have Luxonis OAK-1 W cameras or want to get them separately. The Full Starter Kit costs €799 and includes three cameras, cables, adjustable tripods, and the software license. The Supporter Kit is €1,199 and comes with everything in the Full Starter Kit plus a custom-fitted protective case for easy portability.

Moverse currently estimates shipping to begin in September. Find out more and back the Kickstarter here.

See what other creators are saying and showing in demos:

results.title: Studio-grade markerless MoCap for anyone, anywhere
results.content:
### Scalability

Start low with lean 4-camera setup, and scale it higher to 16+ cameras for increased quality, larger volumes and higher performer counts.

### Velocity

Eliminate calibration and suit-up time. With a unified workflow, Moverse Capture is the fastest end-to-end path from physical performance to digital asset.

## See for yourself.

Observe the quality: No markers, No suits. No jitter. Solid contacts. Smooth motion. Visit our explore page to see for yourself how Moverse captures natural and expressive motion capture with Moverse and a few standard cameras.

 Explore more public data 

Showcased partners

SAE AALTO Studios Copper Candle Impulse Studio Luxonis Knoxlabs Excorp Conartia SAE AALTO Studios Copper Candle Impulse Studio Luxonis Knoxlabs Excorp Conartia [...] Understand the workflow: From the studio to the portal, the Moverse Capture experience flows smoothly. Live stream, record, manage takes, automatically cleanup, download various rigs.

 Deep dive into our docs

Interact with the 3D model  Moverse is compatible with all DCC tools

## Unlocking motion across industries

Professional using XR headset with high-fidelity motion capture tracking

### XR

Empower your immersive virtual worlds with high-fidelity motion. Ideal for real-time applications, interactive experiences, and live performances. [...] # Studio-grade MoCap for anyone, anywhere

Capture. Clean. Create. All in one flow.  
Deploy in any environment with a scalable 4+ camera array.

Try Now!   Playground

Our Belief 

## Flexible capture. Seamless workflows.

We build around the idea that MoCap should be simple. Performers at the front, technology at the back, and minimal layers in between.

Less process. More creation. Faster insights.

### Quality

Moverse Capture delivers production-ready, high-fidelity motion capture data without the complexity and overhead of legacy systems.

### Robustness

Technology breaks when in contact with the real world. Moverse engineers it to hold, maintaining tracking integrity where others struggle.

### Scalability

results.title: MOVER Definition & Meaning - Merriam-Webster
results.content: : one that moves or sets something in motion; especially : one whose business or occupation is the moving of household goods from one residence to another.

results.title: MOVER Definition & Meaning | Dictionary.com
results.content:
# mover

## noun

a person or thing that moves.

Often movers. a person or company whose business is the moving of household effects or office equipment from one location to another.

a powerful and influential person, as in politics or business.

a person who is energetic and ambitious; go-getter.

## idioms

movers and shakers,
powerful and influential people, as in politics and business.

## noun

informal
a person, business, idea, etc, that is advancing or progressing

a person who moves a proposal, as in a debate

a removal firm or a person who works for one

### More idioms and phrases containing mover

## Etymology

### Origin of mover

First recorded in 1350–1400, mover is from the Middle English word mevere. See move, -er 1
